steps.title: Remove parentheses and identify like terms
steps.content:
Write out all four terms: $8nr^2 + 2nr + 4n^2r + 3nr$. Identify terms with identical variable powers:
  • $8nr^2$ has powers $n^1r^2$ — unique
  • $4n^2r$ has powers $n^2r^1$ — unique
  • $2nr$ and $3nr$ both have powers $n^1r^1$ — these are like terms

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Add the coefficients of $2nr$ and $3nr$: $(2 + 3)nr = 5nr$. Rewrite the complete expression with all terms: $$8nr^2 + 4n^2r + 5nr$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
